paragraphs.text:
%md

Rows of (MaxN,N,D) populate s12DF. extendResultDF, a UDF, includes result column.
The entire extendResultDF is reduced in IndexRowSum, an aggrigator.
extendResultDF is reduced by groups in GroupedIndexRowSum object, also an aggrigator.

paragraphs.title: Case class definitions.
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType
import scala.collection.mutable.ArrayBuffer
case class s3TQu(dimension:String,Degree:String,scalar:String,index:String,maxIndex:String,divisor:String,rowCounter:String)
case class s3TQuD(dimension:String,Degree:String,scalar:String,index:DecimalType,maxIndex:String,divisor:String,rowCounter:DecimalType)
case class s3TRe(dimension:String,Degree:String,scalar:String,index:String,maxIndex:String,divisor:String,rowCounter:String,result:String)
case class rResult(rowCounter:String,n:String, maxN:String,dim:String,rowResult:BigDecimal)
case class indexSum(iSum:String,finalISum:String)
case class consistant(rowCounter:BigDecimal,n:BigDecimal, maxN:String,dim:BigDecimal)
case class tupleQuippy(terms:ArrayBuffer[s3TQu],result:BigDecimal)

paragraphs.title: ResultUDF object maps s12DF to UDF extendResult.
paragraphs.text:
object ResultUDF extends Serializable {

import zadscripts.DFScripts
import org.apache.spark.sql.{DataFrame,Dataset}
import scala.collection.mutable.ArrayBuffer
import java.math.BigDecimal
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType
import spark.implicits._

def extendResult(qQuerry:s3TQu): s3TRe = {
  val scalar = new BigDecimal(qQuerry.scalar)
  val degree = qQuerry.Degree.toInt
  val divisor = new BigDecimal(qQuerry.divisor)
  val index = new BigDecimal(qQuerry.maxIndex)
  val indexPower = index.pow(degree)
  val scalarDiv = scalar.divide(divisor)
  val result = indexPower.multiply(scalarDiv)
  val s=  s3TRe(qQuerry.dimension,qQuerry.Degree,qQuerry.scalar,qQuerry.index,qQuerry.maxIndex,qQuerry.divisor,qQuerry.rowCounter,result.toPlainString)
  println(result+"\n")
  s
}

def main(args:Array[String]) {
    
import org.apache.spark.sql.DataFrame
val df= z.get("s12DF").asInstanceOf[DataFrame]
df.schema
df.show    
spark.udf.register("eResult", extendResult _)

val ds: Dataset[s3TQu] = df.as[s3TQu]
val dsCount=ds.count()
ds.show(dsCount.toInt,false)
val dss=ds.map{f => extendResult(s3TQu(f.dimension,f.Degree,f.scalar,f.index,f.maxIndex,f.divisor,f.rowCounter)) }
dss.show(false)
z.put("extendResultDS",dss)
}
}

paragraphs.title: IndexRowsSum object, an Aggregator type, reduces  result column of entire extendResultDS Dataset.
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.{Encoder, Encoders, SparkSession}
import org.apache.spark.sql.expressions.Aggregator
import spark.implicits._
import org.apache.spark.sql.Dataset
import scala.math.BigDecimal

object IndexRowsSum extends Aggregator[s3TRe, indexSum, String] {

  def zero: indexSum = indexSum("0", "0")
  
  def reduce(buffer: indexSum, s3TR: s3TRe): indexSum = {
    val red1= BigDecimal(buffer.iSum)+BigDecimal(s3TR.result)
    val red2=buffer.finalISum  
    indexSum(red1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,red2)
  }
  
  def merge(b1: indexSum, b2: indexSum): indexSum = {
    val mer1=BigDecimal(b1.iSum)+BigDecimal(b2.iSum)
    val mer2=b1.finalISum
    indexSum(mer1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,mer2)
  }
 
  def finish(reduction: indexSum): String = reduction.iSum

  def bufferEncoder: Encoder[indexSum] = Encoders.product

  def outputEncoder: Encoder[String] = Encoders.STRING
}

val ds= z.get("extendResultDS").asInstanceOf[Dataset[s3TRe]]
ds.schema
ds.show 

 val indexResult = IndexRowsSum.toColumn.name("index_Result")
val iResult = ds.select(indexResult)
iResult.show()

paragraphs.title: GroupedIndexRowsSum reduces  groups of (index,rowCounter) extendResultDS.
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.{Encoder, Encoders}
import org.apache.spark.sql.expressions.Aggregator
import spark.implicits._
import org.apache.spark.sql.Dataset
import scala.math.BigDecimal
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType

object GroupedIndexRowsSum extends Aggregator[s3TRe, indexSum, String] {

  def zero: indexSum = indexSum("0", "0")
  def reduce(buffer: indexSum, s3TR: s3TRe): indexSum = {
    val red1= BigDecimal(buffer.iSum)+BigDecimal(s3TR.result)
    val red2=buffer.finalISum  
    indexSum(red1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,red2)
  }
  def merge(b1: indexSum, b2: indexSum): indexSum = {
    val mer1=BigDecimal(b1.iSum)+BigDecimal(b2.iSum)
    val mer2=b1.finalISum
    indexSum(mer1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,mer2)
  }
  def finish(reduction: indexSum): String = reduction.iSum
  def bufferEncoder: Encoder[indexSum] = Encoders.product
  def outputEncoder: Encoder[String] = Encoders.STRING
}
val ds= z.get("extendResultDS").asInstanceOf[Dataset[s3TRe]]
val extendResultDSCoun=ds.count()
val indexResult = IndexRowsSum.toColumn.name("index_Result")    //  maybe should be GroupedIndexRowsSum and be already defined.
val kDS= ds.groupByKey(x=>(x.index.toInt,x.rowCounter.toInt))
   .agg(indexResult)
   .orderBy(asc("key"))
val kdsCount=kDS.count()
kDS.show(kdsCount.toInt,false)
val iResult = ds.select(indexResult)
iResult.show()
